description: The Durco Mark 3 ISO chemical process pump provides outstanding hydraulic performance, unrivaled reliability and low total cost of ownership. Conforming to ISO 2858 and ISO 5199 design criteria, it incorporates many proven reliability and performance-enhancing features.
differentiators: Reverse vane impeller for renewable, high-efficiency performance
SealSentry seal chamber for maximal mechanical seal life

description: The open impeller is the acknowledged best design for process services. It is ideally suited for corrosive/erosive liquids containing solids and stringy materials. The most reliable pumps feature open impellers as standard.
differentiators: Fully open impeller with two times more wear area
i-FRAME power end for improved bearing life and onboard condition monitoring
Rigid baseplate able to withstand heavy forces and moments

description: AHLSTAR process pumps are designed to provide the highest reliability and performance in demanding industrial applications, offering innovative pumping solutions tailored to customer specific needs.
differentiators: Advanced hydraulic design for high pumping performance
Extensive material selection from proprietary foundries
